expectedClassifications.notes: Auto-selects the single result when data arrives. The pattern is: when data changes, call setAzWs. This is 'when X happens, do Y' -- an event handler disguised as an effect. The ref (prevDataRef) is a change-detection guard, not DOM manipulation. The interpreter misclassifies as DOM_EFFECT because it sees ref.current and applies the DOM rule before checking other patterns. Source: WorkstreamsAnalyzerContainer.tsx
